submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import XGate
bloq = XGate()

from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate()
submissions.self_check: ZGate tensor_contract() is 2x2 and diagonal diag(1,-1).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Hadamard
bloq = Hadamard()
submissions.construction_method: Native single-qubit Hadamard bloq from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates.
submissions.self_check: Hadamard tensor_contract() is 2x2 with the standard (1/sqrt(2))[[1,1],[1,-1]] matrix.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CNOT
bloq = CNOT()
submissions.construction_method: Native CNOT bloq; Qualtran returns big-endian with first register as control.
submissions.self_check: CNOT tensor_contract() is 4x4; |10> maps to |11> and vice versa.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TwoBitSwap
bloq = TwoBitSwap()
submissions.self_check: TwoBitSwap tensor_contract() is 4x4 and swaps big-endian |01><->|10>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Toffoli
bloq = Toffoli()
submissions.self_check: Toffoli tensor_contract() is 8x8; flips target iff both controls are |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=2)
submissions.construction_method: Native textbook QFT bloq with bitsize=2 (raw, no bit-reversal).
submissions.self_check: QFTTextBook(2) tensor_contract() is 4x4 raw QFT matrix.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=3)
submissions.construction_method: Native textbook QFT bloq with bitsize=3 (raw, no bit-reversal).
submissions.self_check: QFTTextBook(3) tensor_contract() is 8x8 raw QFT matrix.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate()
submissions.self_check: SGate tensor_contract() is 2x2 and diagonal diag(1,i).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TGate
bloq = TGate()
submissions.self_check: TGate tensor_contract() is 2x2 and diagonal diag(1,exp(i*pi/4)).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CZ
bloq = CZ()
submissions.self_check: CZ tensor_contract() is 4x4 and diagonal diag(1,1,1,-1).

submissions.bloq_code:
import cirq
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ISWAP)
submissions.construction_method: Cirq interop wrapping cirq.ISWAP (no native Qualtran iSWAP bloq).
submissions.self_check: iSWAP tensor_contract() is 4x4; swaps |01><->|10> with phase i.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: SGate controlled once: applies S to target iff first register (control) is |1>.
submissions.self_check: Controlled-S tensor_contract() is 4x4 and diagonal diag(1,1,1,i).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate().controlled().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: ZGate controlled twice (native Qualtran chaining): applies -1 phase iff both controls are |1>.
submissions.self_check: CCZ tensor_contract() is 8x8 and diagonal diag(1,...,1,-1).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=4)
submissions.construction_method: Native textbook QFT bloq with bitsize=4 (raw, no bit-reversal).
submissions.self_check: QFTTextBook(4) tensor_contract() is 16x16 raw QFT matrix.
